have h : {n : Int | even n} ≃ ℕ, from
    Equiv.ofBijective
      (fun n => if n ≥ 0 then 2 * n else -2 * n - 2)
      (by
        constructor
        · intro x y hxy
          simp only [even_iff_two_dvd, Int.dvd_iff_emod_eq_zero] at *
          cases' le_or_lt x 0 with hx hx <;> cases' le_or_lt y 0 with hy hy <;>
            simp_all [Int.mul_emod, Int.add_emod, Int.sub_emod]
          <;> omega
        · intro n
          use n / 2
          simp only [even_iff_two_dvd, Int.dvd_iff_emod_eq_zero]
          cases' le_or_lt n 0 with hn hn <;>
            simp_all [Int.mul_emod, Int.add_emod, Int.sub_emod]
          <;> omega)
  denum_of_equiv_nat h

      (fun n => if n ≥ 0 then 2 * n else -(2 * (-n) + 2))

          simp_all [Int.ofNat_eq_coe, Int.negSucc_coe, mul_add, mul_one, add_assoc]
        <;> omega,

         simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, even_iff_two_dvd]
         split_ifs <;> omega⟩
  denum_of_equiv h

have h : {n : Int | even n} ∼ Nat := 
    let f : Nat → {n : Int | even n} := fun k => ⟨2 * k, by simp [even_mul]⟩
    let g : {n : Int | even n} → Nat := fun x => 
      match x with
      | ⟨n, hn⟩ => if n ≥ 0 then n / 2 else (-n - 1) / 2
    have inv_f_g : ∀ x, f (g x) = x := by
      intro x
      cases' x with n hn
      dsimp only [f, g]
      split_ifs with h
      · have : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by 
          rw [even_iff_two_dvd] at hn
          omega
        simp [this]
      · have : n = -2 * ((-n - 1) / 2 + 1) := by 
          rw [even_iff_two_dvd] at hn
          omega
        simp [this]
        omega
    have inv_g_f : ∀ k, g (f k) = k := by
      intro k
      dsimp only [f, g]
      split_ifs with h
      · omega
      · omega
    Equiv.mk g f inv_g_f inv_f_g
  denum_of_equinumerous_to_nat h
denum_of_equinumerous Int.denum (Set.even_int_equinumerous_nat)

have h : {n : Int | even n} ∼ Nat := 
    let f : Nat → {n : Int | even n} := fun k => ⟨2 * k, by simp [even_mul]⟩
    let g : {n : Int | even n} → Nat := fun x => 
      match x with
      | ⟨n, hn⟩ => if n ≥ 0 then n / 2 else (-n - 1) / 2
    have hf : Function.Injective f := by
      intro a b h
      simpa using h
    have hg : Function.Surjective f := by
      intro x
      cases' x with n hn
      use n / 2
      cases' le_or_lt 0 n with h1 h1 <;> simp_all [even_iff_two_dvd, Int.ediv_eq_of_eq_mul_left]
    Equiv.ofBijective f ⟨hf, hg⟩
  denum_of_equinumerous h

have h : {n : Int | even n} ∼ Nat := 
    let f : Nat → {n : Int | even n} := fun k => 
      if k % 2 = 0 then ⟨k, even_iff_two_dvd.mp (by omega)⟩ 
      else ⟨-k, even_iff_two_dvd.mp (by omega)⟩
    -- Instead, use a simpler bijection:
    have h1 : {n : Int | even n} ∼ Int := 
      Equiv.setOfSubtype (even : Int → Prop)
    have h2 : Int ∼ Nat := denum_Int
    Equiv.trans h1 h2
  ctble_of_ctble_equinum h (denum_Nat)
